g.title: PTSD_QSP
g.text: Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD) QSP Mechanistic Map
HPA Axis/Locus Coeruleus Dysregulation · Amygdala-Hippocampus-vmPFC Fear Circuit · Extinction Neuroplasticity · SSRI/Prazosin/Ketamine/MDMA-Assisted Psychotherapy PK/PD

g.title: cluster_rf

g.title: cluster_fe
g.text: 6. 공포기억 습득/소거 신경가소성 (Fear Memory & Extinction Neuroplasticity)
